examples: I strongly agree that overpopulation has placed an enormous burden on each citizen and the environment.
At a recent seminar, many participants were worried about the fact that overpopulation may give rise to many social security problems.
They are concerned about overpopulation, which, to them, means only more mouths to feed.
In this first installment of an occasional series, I want to consider (briefly) overpopulation and resource exhaustion.
